texto: There is a core value I wanted to illuminate: No matter what kind of family you have - straight, gay, married, single parent, separated, no kids, two kids, 20 kids, whatever - we all go through the human comedy. But if the bonds are strong enough, and the desire is there, you can get to the other side, still together and still a family.
explicacao: Citação de Lisa Cholodenko sobre temas ligados a familia. “There is a core value I wanted to illuminate: No matter what kind of family you have - straight, …” articula familia, strong, together em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como together e value.

texto: I have a deal with HBO to develop television, and I am also developing a movie called 'The Abstinence Teacher,' which is based on a book by Tom Perrotta.
